mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT004#SQL001 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE = '46' AND CODE_1 = '0' AND CODE_2 = 'LIMIT_TIME' AND START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT004#SQL002 */ NVL(SUM(AMOUNT),0) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM T_BOND_F_SALES_PRICE WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct004Sql002RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct004Sql002RequestModel.accountNumber}) AND ORDER_TIME BETWEEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(-1 * #{fct004Sql002RequestModel.name}, 'MINUTE') AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT004#SQL003 */ ORDER_NO , BROKER_CODE , BRAND_CODE , BUTEN_CODE , DEPOSIT_TYPE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , ORDER_COUNT , ORDER_STATUS , TRADE_TYPE , APPOINT_PRICE FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct004Sql003RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct004Sql003RequestModel.accountNumber}) AND ORDER_STATUS IN ('10', '30') AND ORDER_DAY = TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
